description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the registry.gitlab.com/pages/hugo:latest Docker image and sets the variable GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY to recursive. Add a pages job that runs the command hugo, publishes the generated public/ directory as an artifact, and is limited to the master branch via an only rule. Add a test job that also runs hugo but is excluded from the master branch using an except rule. Both jobs use the default stages (pages runs in the deploy stage, test runs in the test stage).
